title: GraphQL Introspection Enabled
description: Active validation confirmed that an unauthenticated GraphQL endpoint returned schema metadata.
impact: Schema disclosure accelerates API enumeration and can expose hidden object relationships or dangerous mutations.
likelihood: Medium for internet-facing GraphQL endpoints that retain default introspection behavior.
recommendations: Disable introspection on production endpoints where it is not required.
Restrict GraphQL access with authentication and authorization checks.
Monitor schema and mutation exposure on public routes.
